title: Mystcraft: Ageless
description: Mystcraft: Ageless is an attempt at reviving the original Mystcraft Minecraft mod by XCompWiz as it was before it became tedious and over-powered (pre 1.4.7) while expanding it to be a fully polished mod.
body:
# Mystcraft: Ageless ### A fresh take on bringing Myst lore to Minecraft This mod is a re-imagination of the early concepts of Mystcraft

_Mystcraft: Ageless is not associated in any way with Mystcraft, Mystcraft 2, XCompWiz or Cyan inc.
**DO NOT report bugs to them**_ ## Bringing the Myst lore to minecraft Mystcraft: Ageless aims to bring the lore of the classic video-game Myst to Minecraft in a fun and engaging way!
## Travel Through dimensions Use magical books to travel across minecraft's dimensions and infinitely more known as ages.
![A green and a yellow book in a minecraft inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7cb060f8b315060be12821fadf2cd902c79c656.png) This Age appears to be completely flat! ![A completely flat world showcasing cherry blossoms, plains and ice spikes in the distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c60763b25dd819f7a9804a0ec69cea8fec9a81c9.png) And this one is comprised of floating islands! ![A floating badlands mountain in the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bb559f5aa6d60fc89c8b4ddb7c4478236ead25.png) **AGES ARE A WORK IN PROGRESS AND ARE THEREFORE NOT STABLE AND MAY KILL YOU ON ENTRY, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED** ## Create dimensional portals Find crystals in Ages and harness their power to create portals that can lead you anywhere you desire.
Use the pink crystal to trim your armor with the all new pink crystal armor trim ![Yellow, Green, Blue, Pink and Red crystals shown beside amethyst and an armor stand using pink crystal trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acd39b36961e27a4171dfc37e5697906bb88c7c8.png) Portals may take all sorts of shapes and sizes! ![A 90 degree bent orange portal made of crystal blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb92609a22a4a330c10b4743e2c58724ebff1ec4.png) ## Create your own worlds **[WIP]** Use the writing desk to create worlds that fit your every need ![A room featuring both sides of the writing desk, it appears to be a mix between a crafting table and a chiseled bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d779b087c65ea5003f002a041836d74df3e82ad.png) ![Made for modfest 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc5a21a9855ab7e957d283ec9e228733b808ecc.png)
